original_question:
A large cube with a side length of $n$ units is painted blue on all six sides and then is cut into $n^3$ smaller unit cubes. We are told that exactly one-third of the total number of faces of all these unit cubes are blue. Determine the value of $n$.
A) 2
B) 3
C) 4
D) 5
E) 6

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
